description: Production-derived false block (frontend audit 2026-07-07): a best-practice reviewer blocked on 'every test file must contain a toMatchInlineSnapshot assertion' - a misread of the skill, which recommends inline snapshots for complex hand-built object assertions, not one per file; the codebase pattern for these assertions is toHaveBeenCalledWith. The validator must check the actual rule text and return refuted, so the clean PR approves.

evidence_trace: unit-test skill discusses inline snapshots for complex assertions
finding.failure_scenario: Without inline snapshots, a drift in the emitted analytics payload passes review because the assertion diff never shows the payload.
finding.model_authored_prose: Unit-test conventions - this file has no `toMatchInlineSnapshot` assertion; the analytics-payload assertions should use inline snapshots.
